title: Deprecated Major version using HTTP GET method for "run URL" instead of expected POST
excerpt:
We are currently experiencing an issue with a previous version of our integration app. We have recently moved to a new Major version , but still have customers using an older, now deprecated version. 
We are finding that…

posts.author: ScottW (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently experiencing an issue with a previous version of our integration app. We have recently moved to a new Major version , but still have customers using an older, now deprecated version.

We are finding that when the run URL is triggered for the integration it is using a HTTP GET instead of the documented and expected HTTP POST, causing a failure in our integration. We are also seeing this behaviour when triggering the “Field definitions URL” for the custom field.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ScottW!

Would you be able to send us a screen recording showing this issue to appsupport@monday.com?
